# Tiny Homes SA

Tiny Homes SA (Tiny Homes South Africa, www.tinyhomesa.com) supplies high-end prefab tiny homes for affordable, sustainable living in South Africa. The range covers six products — folding homes, expandable homes, nature cabins, transparent domes, apple cabins and glamping capsules — priced from R54 950 to R1 100 000, all prices excluding VAT. The company is based in Raslouw, Centurion, Gauteng and delivers nationwide; delivery averages R6 000 – R22 000 per unit depending on distance, diesel rates and abnormal-load permits. Typical timeline is about 90 days from deposit to move-in. Most models are designed for off-grid use with solar, battery, gas geyser and rainwater options. Contact: phone 083 660 3743, email admin@tinyhomesa.com, WhatsApp https://wa.me/27836603743.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.tinyhomesa.com/): Overview of all six prefab tiny home products, from R54 950 to R1 100 000 ex VAT, delivered across South Africa from Centurion.
- [Folding Homes](https://www.tinyhomesa.com/folding-homes): 15 m² X-Fold flat-pack home that unfolds in 10–30 minutes; insulated, fireproof, stackable two high; from R54 950 ex VAT.
- [Expandable Homes](https://www.tinyhomesa.com/expandable-homes): 27.5–72 m² homes (studio to 3 bedrooms) that expand on site in under 2 hours; from R200 000 ex VAT (B20 Slim) to about R600 000 (B40).
- [Nature Cabins](https://www.tinyhomesa.com/nature-cabins): 21 m² steel-frame cabin with timber-look cladding and 1.8 m deck, for beach, bush or mountain sites; from R375 000 ex VAT.
- [The Dome](https://www.tinyhomesa.com/the-dome): 24.6 m² transparent glamping dome with anti-UV panels and blackout curtains; installed in 2–3 days; from R180 000 ex VAT.
- [Apple Cabins](https://www.tinyhomesa.com/apple-cabins): 36.8 m² two-room cabin with 180° panoramic glass, rainfall shower, HVAC and smart lock; from R550 000 ex VAT.
- [Glamping Capsules](https://www.tinyhomesa.com/glamping-capsules): 36.8 m² flagship capsule with 270° glazing, fitted kitchen and off-grid package; from R1 100 000 ex VAT.
- [About](https://www.tinyhomesa.com/about): Company profile — Centurion-based prefab builder, steel construction, roughly 90-day deposit-to-move-in process, nationwide delivery.
- [Contact](https://www.tinyhomesa.com/contact): Phone 083 660 3743, WhatsApp https://wa.me/27836603743, email admin@tinyhomesa.com; based in Raslouw, Centurion, Gauteng.
